title: Stenostomum multinerve

These liverworts are part of the class Jungermanniopsida, a group of non-vascular land plants. The class Jungermanniopsida is further divided into several orders, with Stenostomum multinerve being a member of the order Lepidoziales. The order Lepidoziales is characterized by the presence of perianths, which are modified leaves that protect the spores. The classification of Stenostomum multinerve is an example of the complex and nuanced classification system used in botany.
